title: help with creating subitems from a QTY on a normal item.
excerpt: i need help with using make.com, i know how to use it for the most part but i am stuck on creating sub items from a main item for example if my main item say Red sofa and the QTY says 5 then i would want 5 subitems creat…

posts.author: Lewistaylor (Lewis Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: i need help with using make.com, i know how to use it for the most part but i am stuck on creating sub items from a main item for example if my main item say Red sofa and the QTY says 5 then i would want 5 subitems created.
